ShortDescription.Value: Tweak building attractiveness values directly in-game.

Publish.LongDescription:
### Customize It
Change building attractiveness values right from the game UI.
- Select any building with attractiveness and an **editor panel** appears - **Slider** to set attractiveness from 0 to 500 - One-click **Restore Default** to revert to vanilla values - Changes apply to **all buildings of the same type** - Overrides are **saved automatically** and persist across game restarts
### Note
- Changes take about **5 to 20 seconds** to show up in the tourism menu in-game. The override is applied immediately at the prefab level, but the game's tourism stats take a moment to recalculate.
### Compatibility
- Safe to remove any time. Restore all overrides to default before uninstalling for clean vanilla values. - Does not use Harmony or Reflection; more resilient to game updates. - Avoid running multiple mods that modify building attractiveness at the same time.
### Languages
- English, French
### Support and Feedback
- If the mod helps you, give it a thumbs up! - Report issues on GitHub.
tags: buildings, attractiveness, tourism, customize, tweak
Publish.ChangeLog: * Initial release. * Attractiveness editor panel with slider. * Persistent overrides across saves.
